title: Bye Bye Love
why_this_song: Bye Bye Love by The Everly Brothers (1957) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 7 times; first heard in: "Bye-bye my love, goodbye"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "Hello loneliness"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "I'm through with romance, I'm through with love"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "Bye-bye happiness"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "Hello loneliness"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "goodbye" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "goodbye" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "hello" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "hello" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Goodbye to romance that might've been
And here's the reason that I'm so free

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: I feel like I could die
My lovin' baby is through with me

exercises.prompt_en: "Bye Bye Love" was released in 1957. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "Bye Bye Love" foi lançada em 1957. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "Bye Bye Love" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "Bye Bye Love" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?

exercises.prompt_en: The singer makes a claim or statement in this song. Do you agree with it? Use evidence from the lyrics to support your answer.
exercises.prompt_pt: O cantor faz uma afirmação nessa música. Você concorda? Use pelo menos um verso para defender sua resposta.

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
